name: facefusion-local
description: Run local FaceFusion workflows through MCP tools, resources, and prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Drive FaceFusion from Codex on this machine.
interface.longDescription: FaceFusion Local exposes the local FaceFusion installation as an MCP server with executable tools, stable reference resources, and workflow prompts for environment prep, media processing, job orchestration, and troubleshooting.
defaultPrompt: Check whether my local FaceFusion install is ready to run.
Run a FaceFusion face swap on local media files.
Create and manage a FaceFusion batch job workflow.
